scope: HSK 3.0 exam vocabulary release workbooks, separate from HSK Classic 2.0, ordinary decks, Oxford and Polyglot.

source_policy.source_role: Chinese vocabulary membership, row order, HSK 3.0 level, pinyin and part-of-speech labels. Classic HSK may be candidate evidence only after row-level pinyin/sense classification.

main_sheet.language_columns_source: config/language-order.json spreadsheetCode values in order, excluding ZH for HSK because Chinese is represented by fixed source fields
main_sheet.example_language_columns_source: config/language-order.json spreadsheetCode values in order excluding ZH, prefixed as example_<SPREADSHEET_CODE>

field_rules.word_pinyin: required for Chinese source word only; HSK 3.0 official pinyin wins over Classic pinyin
field_rules.example_pinyin: required only after curated Chinese examples are added
field_rules.translation_cells: short learner-facing meaning in the learner language; blank is allowed only in preparation workbooks before translation packs are generated
field_rules.example_translation_cells: short translation of example_zh in the learner language; blank is allowed only in preparation workbooks before Chinese examples and translation packs are generated
field_rules.classic_reuse_class: exact Classic matches are classified before reuse as exact_same_pinyin, style_only_pinyin, variant_ok, tone_or_neutral_policy, semantic_conflict or absent_as_exact_classic_word
field_rules.zh_language_column: not included in HSK language columns; use source_word/simplified/pinyin/example_zh/example_pinyin fixed source fields instead
